actions.name: add_reaction
actions.description: Add an emoji reaction to a Slack message.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

messageTs.description: The Slack message timestamp, for example '1711.0001'.

name.description: The emoji reaction name without surrounding colons.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding a Slack reaction.

success.description: Whether Slack accepted the reaction request.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: delete_file
actions.description: Delete a Slack file.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Slack file.

success.description: Whether Slack accepted the file delete request.

fileId.description: The Slack file ID that was deleted.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: delete_message
actions.description: Delete a Slack message posted by the bot.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

messageTs.description: The Slack message timestamp, for example '1711.0001'.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Slack message.

channelId.description: The conversation identifier containing the message.

messageTs.description: The timestamp identifier of the message.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a Slack message reference.

actions.name: get_channel_messages
actions.description: Get recent messages from a Slack conversation.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

limit.description: The maximum number of messages to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading Slack conversation history.

userId.description: The user ID of the message author.

text.description: The text content of the message.

messages.description: The list of messages in the conversation.

hasMore.description: Whether more messages are available beyond this page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_conversation
actions.description: Get metadata for a Slack conversation.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

includeLocale.description: Whether Slack should include the locale field.

includeNumMembers.description: Whether Slack should include the member count field.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a Slack conversation.

channelId.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

anyOf.description: The name of the conversation when available.
Whether the conversation is archived.
Whether the conversation is private.
Whether the bot user is a member.

memberCount.description: The member count when Slack provides it.

anyOf.description: The conversation topic.
The conversation purpose.

userId.description: The linked user identifier for IM conversations.

locale.description: The locale returned by Slack when requested.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_file
actions.description: Get metadata for a Slack file.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a Slack file.

urlPrivate.description: The private Slack URL for the file when returned.

file.description: A Slack file object returned by the Web API.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_message_permalink
actions.description: Get a permalink for a Slack message.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

messageTs.description: The Slack message timestamp, for example '1711.0001'.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a Slack message permalink.

channelId.description: The conversation identifier containing the target message.

messageTs.description: The timestamp identifier of the target message.

permalink.description: The permalink URL returned by Slack.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_reactions
actions.description: Get reactions for a Slack message.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

messageTs.description: The Slack message timestamp, for example '1711.0001'.

full.description: Whether Slack should return the complete reaction user lists.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading Slack reactions.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_thread
actions.description: Get messages in a Slack thread.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

threadTs.description: The timestamp of the parent message.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a Slack thread.

userId.description: The user ID of the message author.

text.description: The text content of the message.

messages.description: The list of messages in the thread.

hasMore.description: Whether more messages are available beyond this page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Get metadata for a Slack user.

includeLocale.description: Whether Slack should include the locale field.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a Slack user.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user.

anyOf.description: The username of the user.
The real name of the user.
The display name of the user.
Whether the user is a bot user.
Whether the user is deleted.
Whether the user is an admin.
Whether the user is an owner.

locale.description: The locale returned by Slack when requested.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_channels
actions.description: List Slack public channels visible to the bot.

limit.description: The maximum number of channels to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Slack channels.

channelId.description: The unique identifier of the channel.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_conversations
actions.description: List Slack conversations visible to the bot.

limit.description: The maximum number of conversations to return.

excludeArchived.description: Whether archived conversations should be excluded.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Slack conversations.

channelId.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

anyOf.description: The name of the conversation when available.
Whether the conversation is archived.
Whether the conversation is private.
Whether the bot user is a member.

memberCount.description: The member count when Slack provides it.

anyOf.description: The conversation topic.
The conversation purpose.

userId.description: The linked user identifier for IM conversations.

locale.description: The locale returned by Slack when requested.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_files
actions.description: List Slack files visible to the bot, optionally filtered by channel or user.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

types.description: Comma-separated Slack file type filters, for example 'images,pdfs'.

count.description: The number of files to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Slack files.

urlPrivate.description: The private Slack URL for the file when returned.

items.description: A Slack file object returned by the Web API.

files.description: The Slack files returned by Slack.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Slack users visible to the bot.

limit.description: The maximum number of users to return.

includeLocale.description: Whether Slack should include the locale field.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Slack users.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user.

anyOf.description: The username of the user.
The real name of the user.
The display name of the user.
Whether the user is a bot user.
Whether the user is deleted.
Whether the user is an admin.
Whether the user is an owner.

locale.description: The locale returned by Slack when requested.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: open_conversation
actions.description: Open or resume a direct message with one Slack user.

userIds.description: The single Slack user to include in the DM.

preventCreation.description: Whether Slack should avoid creating a new conversation.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for opening a Slack DM.

channelId.description: The opened Slack conversation ID.
The unique identifier of the conversation.

anyOf.description: The name of the conversation when available.
Whether the conversation is archived.
Whether the conversation is private.
Whether the bot user is a member.

memberCount.description: The member count when Slack provides it.

anyOf.description: The conversation topic.
The conversation purpose.

userId.description: The linked user identifier for IM conversations.

locale.description: The locale returned by Slack when requested.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: post_ephemeral_message
actions.description: Post an ephemeral Slack message visible only to one user in a conversation.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

text.description: Plain text message content. When blocks are provided, Slack uses this as notification and accessibility fallback text.

items.description: A Slack Block Kit block object. Pass the block exactly as Slack documents it.

blocks.description: Slack Block Kit blocks to render in the message.

items.description: A Slack legacy attachment object. Prefer blocks for new messages when possible.

attachments.description: Slack legacy attachments to include in the message.

unfurlLinks.description: Whether Slack should unfurl links in the message.

unfurlMedia.description: Whether Slack should unfurl media in the message.

metadata.description: Slack message metadata to attach to the message.

userId.description: The user who should receive the ephemeral message.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for posting an ephemeral Slack message.

channelId.description: The conversation identifier where the message was sent.

messageTs.description: The timestamp identifier of the ephemeral message.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: post_message
actions.description: Post a Slack message. Use text for plain messages, or blocks for rich Block Kit layouts with text as fallback.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

text.description: Plain text message content. When blocks are provided, Slack uses this as notification and accessibility fallback text.

items.description: A Slack Block Kit block object. Pass the block exactly as Slack documents it.

blocks.description: Slack Block Kit blocks to render in the message.

items.description: A Slack legacy attachment object. Prefer blocks for new messages when possible.

attachments.description: Slack legacy attachments to include in the message.

unfurlLinks.description: Whether Slack should unfurl links in the message.

unfurlMedia.description: Whether Slack should unfurl media in the message.

metadata.description: Slack message metadata to attach to the message.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for posting a Slack message.

ts.description: The timestamp identifier of the posted message.

channelId.description: The channel ID where the message was posted.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a posted Slack message.

actions.name: remove_reaction
actions.description: Remove an emoji reaction from a Slack message.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

messageTs.description: The Slack message timestamp, for example '1711.0001'.

name.description: The emoji reaction name without surrounding colons.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for removing a Slack reaction.

success.description: Whether Slack accepted the reaction removal request.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: reply_message
actions.description: Reply to a Slack thread. Use text, blocks, or attachments for the reply content.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

text.description: Plain text message content. When blocks are provided, Slack uses this as notification and accessibility fallback text.

items.description: A Slack Block Kit block object. Pass the block exactly as Slack documents it.

blocks.description: Slack Block Kit blocks to render in the message.

items.description: A Slack legacy attachment object. Prefer blocks for new messages when possible.

attachments.description: Slack legacy attachments to include in the message.

unfurlLinks.description: Whether Slack should unfurl links in the message.

unfurlMedia.description: Whether Slack should unfurl media in the message.

metadata.description: Slack message metadata to attach to the message.

threadTs.description: The timestamp of the parent message to reply to.

replyBroadcast.description: Whether Slack should also broadcast the reply to the channel.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for replying to a Slack thread.

ts.description: The timestamp identifier of the posted message.

channelId.description: The channel ID where the message was posted.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a posted Slack message.

actions.name: schedule_message
actions.description: Schedule a Slack message to be posted later. Use text or blocks for the scheduled content.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

text.description: Plain text message content. When blocks are provided, Slack uses this as notification and accessibility fallback text.

items.description: A Slack Block Kit block object. Pass the block exactly as Slack documents it.

blocks.description: Slack Block Kit blocks to render in the message.

items.description: A Slack legacy attachment object. Prefer blocks for new messages when possible.

attachments.description: Slack legacy attachments to include in the message.

unfurlLinks.description: Whether Slack should unfurl links in the message.

unfurlMedia.description: Whether Slack should unfurl media in the message.

metadata.description: Slack message metadata to attach to the message.

postAt.description: The Unix timestamp when Slack should post the message.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for scheduling a Slack message.

channelId.description: The conversation identifier where the message will be posted.

scheduledMessageId.description: The scheduled message identifier returned by Slack.

postAt.description: The Unix timestamp when Slack will post the message.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: update_message
actions.description: Update a Slack message posted by the bot. Provide text, blocks, or attachments as the new message content.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

text.description: Plain text message content. When blocks are provided, Slack uses this as notification and accessibility fallback text.

items.description: A Slack Block Kit block object. Pass the block exactly as Slack documents it.

blocks.description: Slack Block Kit blocks to render in the message.

items.description: A Slack legacy attachment object. Prefer blocks for new messages when possible.

attachments.description: Slack legacy attachments to include in the message.

unfurlLinks.description: Whether Slack should unfurl links in the message.

unfurlMedia.description: Whether Slack should unfurl media in the message.

metadata.description: Slack message metadata to attach to the message.

messageTs.description: The Slack message timestamp, for example '1711.0001'.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a Slack message.

channelId.description: The conversation identifier containing the message.

messageTs.description: The timestamp identifier of the message.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a Slack message reference.

actions.name: upload_file
actions.description: Upload a file to Slack using the current external upload flow. Provide fileUrl; binary content is fetched by the connector runtime.

filename.description: The file name Slack should display.

fileUrl.description: A URL whose response body should be uploaded to Slack.

title.description: Optional file title shown in Slack.

channelId.description: The Slack conversation or channel ID.

initialComment.description: Optional message text to post with the file.

threadTs.description: The Slack message timestamp, for example '1711.0001'.

mimeType.description: The content type to send while uploading the file.

altText.description: Alternative text for the uploaded file when Slack supports it.

snippetType.description: Slack snippet type for text snippets.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for uploading a Slack file.

urlPrivate.description: The private Slack URL for the file when returned.

items.description: A Slack file object returned by the Web API.

files.description: Files returned by Slack after completing the upload.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.
